# LibreNG UI

> The Most Complete Angular UI Component Library

## Guides

- [Installation](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/installation): Setting up LibreNG UI in an Angular CLI project.
- [Configuration](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/configuration): Application wide configuration for LibreNG UI.
- [Styled Mode](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/theming/styled): Choose from a variety of pre-styled themes or develop your own.
- [Unstyled Mode](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/theming/unstyled): Theming LibreNG UI with alternative styling approaches.
- [Icons](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/icons): PrimeIcons is the default icon library of LibreNG UI with over 250 open source icons.
- [Custom Icons](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/customicons): Use custom icons with LibreNG UI components.
- [Pass Through](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/passthrough): Pass Through Props allow direct access to the underlying elements for complete customization.
- [Tailwind CSS](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/tailwind): Integration between LibreNG UI and Tailwind CSS.
- [LLMs.txt](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/llms): LLM-optimized documentation endpoints for LibreNG UI components.
- [MCP Server](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/mcp): Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for LibreNG UI component library.
- [Accessibility](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/guides/accessibility): LibreNG UI has WCAG 2.1 AA level compliance.
- [Animations](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/guides/animations): Built-in CSS animations for LibreNG UI components.
- [RTL](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/guides/rtl): Right-to-left support for LibreNG UI components.
- [Migration v19](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/migration/v19): Migration guide to LibreNG UI v19.
- [Migration v20](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/migration/v20): Migration guide to LibreNG UI v20.
- [Migration v21](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/migration/v21): Migration guide to LibreNG UI v21.

## Components

- [Angular Accordion Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/accordion): Accordion groups a collection of contents in tabs.
- [Angular Animate On Scroll Directive](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/animateonscroll): AnimateOnScroll is used to apply animations to elements when entering or leaving the viewport during scrolling.
- [Angular AutoComplete Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/autocomplete): AutoComplete is an input component that provides real-time suggestions when being typed.
- [Angular AutoFocus Directive](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/autofocus): AutoFocus manages focus on focusable element on load.
- [Angular Avatar Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/avatar): Avatar represents people using icons, labels and images.
- [Angular Badge Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/badge): Badge is a small status indicator for another element.
- [Angular BlockUI Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/blockui): BlockUI can either block other components or the whole page.
- [Angular Breadcrumb Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/breadcrumb): Breadcrumb provides contextual information about page hierarchy.
- [Angular Button Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/button): Button is an extension to standard button element with icons and theming.
- [Angular Card Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/card): Card is a flexible container component.
- [Angular Carousel Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/carousel): Carousel is a content slider featuring various customization options.
- [Angular CascadeSelect Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/cascadeselect): CascadeSelect displays a nested structure of options.
- [Angular Chart Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/chart): Chart components are based on Charts.js 3.3.2+, an open source HTML5 based charting library.
- [Angular Checkbox Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/checkbox): Checkbox is an extension to standard checkbox element with theming.
- [Angular Chip Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/chip): Chip represents entities using icons, labels and images.
- [Angular ColorPicker Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/colorpicker): ColorPicker is an input component to select a color.
- [Angular ConfirmDialog Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/confirmdialog): ConfirmDialog is backed by a service utilizing Observables to display confirmation windows easily that can be shared by multiple actions on the same component.
- [Angular ConfirmPopup Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/confirmpopup): ConfirmPopup displays a confirmation overlay displayed relatively to its target.
- [Angular ContextMenu Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/contextmenu): ContextMenu displays an overlay menu on right click of its target.
- [Angular DataView Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/dataview): DataView displays data in grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 or list layout with pagination and sorting features.
- [Angular DatePicker Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/datepicker): DatePicker is an input component to select a date.
- [Angular Dialog Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/dialog): Dialog is a container to display content in an overlay window.
- [Angular Divider Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/divider): Divider is used to separate contents.
- [Angular Dock Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/dock): Dock is a navigation component consisting of menuitems.
- [Angular Drag and Drop Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/dragdrop): pDraggable and pDroppable directives apply drag-drop behaviors to any element.
- [Angular Drawer Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/drawer): Drawer is a container component displayed as an overlay.
- [Angular Dynamic Dialog Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/dynamicdialog): Dialogs can be created dynamically with any component as the content using a DialogService.
- [Angular Editor Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/editor): Editor is rich text editor component based on Quill.
- [Angular Fieldset Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/fieldset): Fieldset is a grouping component with a content toggle feature.
- [Angular FileUpload Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/fileupload): FileUpload is an advanced uploader with dragdrop support, multi file uploads, auto uploading, progress tracking and validations.
- [Angular Float Label Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/floatlabel): FloatLabel appears on top of the input field when focused.
- [Angular Fluid Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/fluid): Fluid is a layout component to make descendant components span full width of their container.
- [Angular Focus Trap Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/focustrap): Focus Trap keeps focus within a certain DOM element while tabbing.
- [Angular Gallery Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/galleria): Galleria is an advanced content gallery component.
- [Angular IconField Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/iconfield): IconField wraps an input and an icon.
- [Angular Ifta Label Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/iftalabel): IftaLabel is used to create infield top aligned labels.
- [Angular Image Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/image): Displays an image with preview and tranformation options.
- [Angular ImageCompare Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/imagecompare): Compare two images side by side with a slider.
- [Angular Inplace Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/inplace): Inplace provides an easy to do editing and display at the same time where clicking the output displays the actual content.
- [Angular InputGroup Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/inputgroup): Text, icon, buttons and other content can be grouped next to an input.
- [Angular InputMask Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/inputmask): InputMask component is used to enter input in a certain format such as numeric, date, currency and phone.
- [Angular InputNumber Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/inputnumber): InputNumber is an input component to provide numerical input.
- [Angular InputText Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/inputtext): InputText is an extension to standard input element with theming and keyfiltering.
- [Angular KeyFilter Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/keyfilter): KeyFilter is a directive to restrict individual key strokes. In order to restrict the whole input, use InputNumber or InputMask instead.
- [Angular Knob Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/knob): Knob is a form component to define number inputs with a dial.
- [Angular Listbox Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/listbox): Listbox is used to select one or more values from a list of items.
- [Angular MegaMenu Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/megamenu): MegaMenu is navigation component that displays submenus together.
- [Angular Menu Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/menu): Menu is a navigation / command component that supports dynamic and static positioning.
- [Angular Menubar Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/menubar): Menubar is a horizontal menu component.
- [Angular Message Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/message): Message component is used to display inline messages.
- [Angular MeterGroup Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/metergroup): MeterGroup displays scalar measurements within a known range.
- [Angular MultiSelect Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/multiselect): MultiSelect is used to select multiple items from a collection.
- [Angular OrderList Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/orderlist): OrderList is used to sort a collection.
- [Angular Organization Chart Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/organizationchart): OrganizationChart visualizes hierarchical organization data.
- [Angular Otp Input Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/inputotp): Input Otp is used to enter one time passwords.
- [Angular Paginator Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/paginator): Paginator displays data in paged format and provides navigation between pages.
- [Angular Panel Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/panel): Panel is a container component with an optional content toggle feature.
- [Angular PanelMenu Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/panelmenu): PanelMenu is a hybrid of Accordion and Tree components.
- [Angular Password Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/password): Password displays strength indicator for password fields.
- [Angular PickList Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/picklist): PickList is used to reorder items between different lists.
- [Angular Popover Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/popover): Popover is a container component that can overlay other components on page.
- [Angular ProgressBar Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/progressbar): ProgressBar is a process status indicator.
- [Angular ProgressSpinner Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/progressspinner): ProgressSpinner is a process status indicator.
- [Angular RadioButton Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/radiobutton): RadioButton is an extension to standard radio button element with theming.
- [Angular Rating Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/rating): Rating component is a star based selection input.
- [Angular Ripple Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/ripple): Ripple directive adds ripple effect to the host element.
- [Angular Scroll Panel Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/scrollpanel): ScrollPanel is a cross browser, lightweight and skinnable alternative to native browser scrollbar.
- [Angular Scroll Top Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/scrolltop): ScrollTop gets displayed after a certain scroll position and used to navigates to the top of the page quickly.
- [Angular Select Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/select): Select is used to choose an item from a collection of options.
- [Angular SelectButton Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/selectbutton): SelectButton is used to choose single or multiple items from a list using buttons.
- [Angular Skeleton Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/skeleton): Skeleton is a placeholder to display instead of the actual content.
- [Angular Slider Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/slider): Slider is a component to provide input with a drag handle.
- [Angular Speed Dial Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/speeddial): SpeedDial is a floating button with a popup menu.
- [Angular SplitButton Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/splitbutton): SplitButton groups a set of commands in an overlay with a default action item.
- [Angular Splitter Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/splitter): Splitter is utilized to separate and resize panels.
- [Angular Stepper Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/stepper): The Stepper component displays a wizard-like workflow by guiding users through the multi-step progression.
- [Angular StyleClass Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/styleclass): StyleClass manages css classes declaratively to during enter/leave animations or just to toggle classes on an element.
- [Angular Table Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/table): Table displays data in tabular format.
- [Angular Tabs Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/tabs): Tabs is a container component to group content with tabs.
- [Angular Tag Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/tag): Tag component is used to categorize content.
- [Angular Terminal Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/terminal): 
- [Angular Textarea Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/textarea): Textarea adds styling and autoResize functionality to standard textarea element.
- [Angular TieredMenu Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/tieredmenu): TieredMenu displays submenus in nested overlays.
- [Angular Timeline Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/timeline): Timeline visualizes a series of chained events.
- [Angular Toast Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/toast): Toast is used to display messages in an overlay.
- [Angular ToggleButton Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/togglebutton): ToggleButton is used to select a boolean value using a button.
- [Angular ToggleSwitch Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/toggleswitch): ToggleSwitch is used to select a boolean value.
- [Angular Toolbar Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/toolbar): Toolbar is a grouping component for buttons and other content.
- [Angular Tooltip Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/tooltip): Tooltip directive provides advisory information for a component. Tooltip is integrated within various LibreNG UI components.
- [Angular Tree Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/tree): Tree is used to display hierarchical data.
- [Angular TreeSelect Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/treeselect): TreeSelect is a form component to choose from hierarchical data.
- [Angular TreeTable Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/treetable): TreeTable is used to display hierarchical data in tabular format.
- [Angular Virtual Scroller Component](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/scroller): VirtualScroller is a performance-approach to handle huge data efficiently.
- [LLMs.txt - LibreNG UI](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/llms): LLM-optimized documentation endpoints for LibreNG UI components.
- [MCP Server - LibreNG UI](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/mcp): Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for LibreNG UI component library. Provides AI assistants with comprehensive access to LibreNG UI component documentation.
- [Overlay API - LibreNG UI](https://github.com/JackAndJack26/libreng-ui/overlay): This API allows overlay components to be controlled from the LibreNG UI. In this way, all overlay components in the application can have the same behavior.
